chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1124 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.01.2018. Mr. Muhammad Hassan Jakhro Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G -=-=- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and shall not press this constitutional petition if appropriate directions are given to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. Learned Asstt:A.G present in court in other cases waives the notice and record his no objection on the above proposition. In view of above this constitutional petition stands disposed of with direction to official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
